content:
- Continued task `.ralph/tasks/bugs/bug-remove-unwrap-panic-allow.md` from TO BE VERIFIED.
- Ran deep skeptical verification with broad parallel repo scans; identified missing scope in plan (binary helper call sites outside test_harness).
- Updated implementation plan in task file, added non-harness call-site propagation and focused pre-gates, then switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Executed refactor: `src/test_harness/binaries.rs` now returns `Result` instead of panicking; removed harness clippy allow for unwrap/expect/panic; converted panic-heavy harness tests in `mod.rs`, `namespace.rs`, and `pg16.rs` to `Result` flows.
- Propagated fallible binary helpers through `src/test_harness/etcd3.rs`, `src/pginfo/worker.rs`, `src/dcs/etcd_store.rs`, and `src/process/worker.rs` (including converting two process real-binary tests to `Result<(), WorkerError>`).
- Verified `src/test_harness` has zero `panic!/unwrap/expect` and no clippy allow exceptions for those lints.
- Focused tests passed (`cargo test test_harness`, `cargo test pginfo::worker::tests`, `cargo test process::worker::tests`, `cargo test dcs::etcd_store::tests`) and full required gates passed sequentially (`make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`).
- Updated task file status/checklists/evidence, ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`, and appended a new cross-app learning to AGENTS.md.
- Next immediate step: commit all modified files with message `task finished bug-remove-unwrap-panic-allow: ...` including gate evidence and implementation summary, then quit.
